name: J1939GetNumOfDTCs
title: J1939GetNumOfDTCs
syntax: long J1939GetNumOfDTCs(pg pgWithDTCs, dword spn, byte fmi, byte oc)
description: Function looks through a J1939 diagnostic message and returns the number of DTC blocks that match the search criteria, i.e. that contains defined SPN/FMI/OC values.

parameters.name: pgWithDTC
parameters.description: Message to be checked for a specific DTC block. Must be a J1939 Parameter Group.

parameters.name: spn
parameters.description: Suspect Parameter Number of the specified DTC. 0xFFFFFFFF if spn is to be ignored.

parameters.name: fmi
parameters.description: Failure Mode Identifier of the specified DTC. 0xFFFF if fmi is to be ignored.

parameters.name: oc
parameters.description: Occurrence Counter of the specified DTC . 0xFFFF if oc is to be ignored.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
